name: Little Teddy Bear Preschool - Madhurawada

itemListElement.reviewBody: We are satisfied with good environment and good carring to child, good teaching. Good in skill development activities in children. Finally it's very good for kids
Good teaching staff and helping staff

This review evaluates Arvindh's progress and development during his study at Little Teddy Bear Preschool. The assessment is based on observations, interactions, and assessments conducted by the school's educators.
He has demonstrated positive and steady progress that reflect his improved social skills, and enhanced cognitive abilities.
He has shown potential for age-appropriate academic expectations. He exhibits language development, numeracy skills, problem-solving abilities.
He has developed positive social and emotional skills. He demonstrates social behavior, such as cooperation, sharing, empathy]. Now, Arvindh is confident in expressing his needs and emotions.
Not to forget the physical development is within age-appropriate norms. He exhibits strengths in gross motor skills, such as running, jumping, climbing and fine motor skills, such as writing, drawing, cutting.

Little Teddy Bear preschool with Montessori curriculum and dedicated teaching and supporting staff, is recommended to any parent who is in search of a preschool.

Our experience with Little Teddy Bear Preschool has been truly exceptional. The teaching quality is excellent, and the structured environment ensures effective learning for children. Highly recommended.

We had visited multiple preschools when we first moved to Madhurawada. Although there were more fancy facilities out there, we felt a sense of comfort and homeyness with LITTLE TEDDY BEAR PRESCHOOL, that we did not feel on our visits to others.They follow MONTESSORI CURRICULUM, which inspires the children towards a lifelong love of learning.

I was so worried about my son starting to go to preschool, but we cannot thank the staff enough for the amazing care that they have provided our son even though he made it tough ,crying for so many days.

The staff is very loving and does a wonderful job taking care of and teaching the kids. My son clearly feels the love and warmth from his teachers, which is invaluable as a parent. It is hard to trust others to care for your children,But I have been so happy with their care. I am so impressed at how well they interact with the children and their parents.

Even the helpers treats the kids as their own. And I was surprised to see them speaking English with kids, which I have never seen before in any preschool here.

I don't write reviews for anything, but I need to take the time to shout out the amazing staff, and Management team here.

I highly recommend this preschool to any parent who wants a well balanced environment for their child.

My daughter Riya studied from nursery to ukg in this school...Im happy to share that she improved alot and she enjoyed though.The dedication of the teachers and staff is commendable.Thanks to all teachers for the care and dedication that you put into teaching our child.You have always been helpful and friendly.School environment is very nice so kids enjoy learning.Teaching tools and methodology is much appreciatble.

One of the premier preschools situated in the Madhurawada Area (Vizag), this institution stands out as an ideal choice for parents seeking high-quality early education for their children. Featuring a great campus with state-of-the-art facilities, a meticulously maintained environment, and a dedicated team of well-trained faculty, including staff trained in personal care assistance, such as assisting with restroom needs, greeting children upon arrival, helping with belongings, ensuring completion of snacks, and ensuring their hygiene, among other aspects.

In terms of academic offerings, this school boasts a superior curriculum focused on experiential learning through play. My daughter has been enrolled for the past two years and has consistently demonstrated enthusiasm for learning, showing no signs of undue stress or reluctance towards homework. Remarkably, she has developed proficient English language skills at the age of four, a testament to the effectiveness of the teaching staff.

While the current academic program has proven highly beneficial, there is a suggestion for management to consider extending the curriculum beyond the UKG level, thereby offering continued academic enrichment to students.

Thank you!

My daughter is studying Nursery at Little Teddy Bear Preschool.
As a parent of a child in this school, I've been consistently impressed by the dedication of the teachers who genuinely care about their students. Not only do they prioritize academic growth, but they also take personal care of each child, regularly updating parents on their progress. The school maintains high standards of hygiene, ensuring a comfortable environment for the kids, which further motivates their interest in attending school. Additionally, the school organizes events periodically to foster the development of interpersonal skills, creating a well-rounded educational experience for every student.

Thanks & Regards
Sravan kumar

The teaching methodology and environment  has so beautifully wrapped him up, that there is a remarkable improvement in not only his academics but also in his total behaviour.
He has become much more sociable with other children, shedding his shyness and becoming more confident in expressing himself.
The teaching staff cater to the individual needs of each child and Helper Staff take good care in being patient with the children.
The school is so neatly maintained and has a pleasant atmosphere.
I am so glad that I have joined my son at Little Teddy Bear Preschool

Little Teddy Bear preschool is a gem in early childhood education. The warmth and dedication of the staff make it feel like an extended family. The emphasis on social skills, alongside academics, is commendable. Highly appreciate the staff and correspondent's approach towards child care and their special attention in fostering the child's growth. Our kid was slightly behind in social skills but just after few months we noticed remarkable improvement
